# Integration test for mcp-shadow
# Skip if running in short mode
[short] skip

# Build mcp-shadow in current directory
cd /Volumes/tmc/go/src/github.com/tmc/mcp/exp/cmd/mcp-shadow
env GOWORK=off
exec go build
exists mcp-shadow

# Create temporary directory for test files
env TMPDIR=$WORK/tmp
mkdir $TMPDIR

# Create test trace file
cd $TMPDIR
exec sh -c 'echo "#mcptrace:v1" > primary.mcp'
exec sh -c 'echo "mcp-recv {\"method\":\"test\",\"id\":1} # 1000" >> primary.mcp'

# Create shadow trace file
exec sh -c 'echo "#mcptrace:v1" > shadow.mcp'
exec sh -c 'echo "mcp-recv {\"method\":\"test\",\"id\":1} # 1000" >> shadow.mcp'

# Create an echo script to simulate servers
exec sh -c 'echo "#!/bin/sh" > echo_server.sh'
exec sh -c 'echo "while read line; do" >> echo_server.sh'
exec sh -c 'echo "  echo \\\"\$line\\\"" >> echo_server.sh'
exec sh -c 'echo "done" >> echo_server.sh'
exec chmod +x echo_server.sh

# Test basic shadow mode without files (just build test)
exec /Volumes/tmc/go/src/github.com/tmc/mcp/exp/cmd/mcp-shadow/mcp-shadow -h
stderr 'Usage'
stderr 'primary server command to execute'
stderr 'shadow server command to execute'
